haiku:
Sunny yolks delight,
Whisking dreams in morning light,
Eggs dance in the pan.
Happy #NationalEggDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful laughter rings,
Echoes of hearts intertwine,
Memories replay.
Happy #RepeatDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sparkling candles glow,
Laughter bubbles like ripe fruit,
Joyful hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayJosephineBaker from @ClamBakeSanta

Creamy wheels of joy,
Savory bites bring delight,
Cheese dreams melt away.
Happy #NationalCheeseDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Purring on my lap,
Whiskers twitch with joy and warmth,
Furry love abounds.
Happy #NationalHugYourCatDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Candies shimmer like starlight,
Joyous hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayAngelinaJolie from @ClamBakeSanta

Leaves shimmer with dew,
Whispers of life all around,
Sunlight warms the earth.
Happy #WorldEnvironmentDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sugar spiced delight,
Gingerbread houses arise,
Frosting dreams take flight.
Happy #NationalGingerbreadDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers of the moon,
Songs weave through the nighttime air,
Stars twinkle in joy.
#HappyBirthdayFedericoGarciaLorca from @ClamBakeSanta

Cinnamon and spice,
Applesauce hugs the warm cake,
Sweet joy on each bite.
Happy #NationalApplesauceCakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Hands deep in rich soil,
Colors burst in joyful blooms,
Nature’s song surrounds.
Happy #NationalGardeningExerciseDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages crisp and white,
Words like stars dance in the night,
Joy blooms in the light.
#HappyBirthdayAlexanderPushkin from @ClamBakeSanta

Balloons sway and shine,
Sweet laughter fills the warm night,
Joy wraps like soft quilts.
#HappyBirthdayThomasMann from @ClamBakeSanta

Cool scoop in my hand,
Melting sweetly, rich delight,
Chocolate dreams abound.
Happy #NationalChocolateIceCreamDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Dapper ties arranged,
Colors dance with bright sunlight,
Style wrapped in pure cheer.
Happy #NationalBowtieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors dance and sway,
Brush strokes of joy embrace life,
Art blooms in warm light.
#HappyBirthdayPaulGauguin from @ClamBakeSanta

Waves dance with the sun,
Bright shells twinkle on the shore,
Blue depths sing with joy.
Happy #WorldOceansDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunshine warms the heart,
Side by side, dreams take their flight,
Friendship's sweet embrace.
Happy #NationalBestFriendsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Designs like sunlight,
Nature dances through the glass,
Harmony in blooms.
#HappyBirthdayFrankLloydWright from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver light whispers,
Soft shadows dance in the night,
Stars twinkle with joy.
Happy #LastQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta

Fresh pie on the sill,
Sweet-tart scents in the warm air,
Crust and joy unite.
Happy #NationalStrawberryRhubarbPieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Feathers bright and bold,
Splashing in a sunny pond,
Waddles full of glee.
Happy #DonaldDuckDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright notes fill the room,
Melodies dance like warm light,
Cake and cheer abound.
#HappyBirthdayColePorter from @ClamBakeSanta
